fileContext.overview: This file is responsible for building a semantic index of a codebase, which includes a flat symbol index, a file index, and an inverted keyword index. The index is built by analyzing file contexts and dependency graphs, and is persisted to disk in JSON format.

symbols.name: buildIndex
symbols.purpose: Builds a semantic index of a codebase
symbols.behavior: Analyzes file contexts and dependency graphs to create a flat symbol index, a file index, and an inverted keyword index
symbols.limitations: Requires file contexts and dependency graphs to be available

symbols.name: persistIndex
symbols.purpose: Persists a semantic index to disk in JSON format
symbols.behavior: Writes the index to a file at the specified path

symbols.name: persistContextOverview
symbols.purpose: Persists a context overview to disk in Markdown format
symbols.behavior: Writes a Markdown file containing a summary of the codebase and its symbols
symbols.limitations: Requires a valid index object and dependency graph

symbols.name: inlineOverview
symbols.purpose: Formats an overview string for inline use in a Markdown list item
symbols.behavior: Collapses embedded newlines, truncates with … at 200 chars, and falls back to italicised placeholder if empty
